description: Example Agent Guard configuration for a generic project. Copy and adapt to your repository.

acquire_lease_before_any_work.description: Every agent session must acquire a lease before creating branches, editing files, or committing.

reuse_branch_in_same_session.description: If the worktree is already on an ia-<identity> branch, reuse it.

create_new_branch_only_from_clean_base.description: A new timestamped branch may only be created when the worktree is on the base branch.

block_direct_work_on_main_repo.description: The main repo is reserved for humans and deploy. Agents must work inside their assigned worktree.

block_commit_on_dirty_worktree.description: Commits are only allowed when the worktree reflects the agent's own session state.
